report_policy: Tracked eval_datasets files keep only fixtures, schema notes, manifests, and redacted summaries. Full gate JSON and Markdown outputs are generated under artifacts/eval-runs/ and ignored by git.
generated_reset_ddl_policy: db/imports/market_ingestion_contract.py may generate reset DDL for contract/dry-run inspection, but executing it requires an explicit unsafe flag because it contains DROP SCHEMA CASCADE.

tracked_fixture_summary.cn_fixture_role: legacy A-share row-shape contract fixture only; not part of non-A PostgreSQL DB gate coverage
